title: lomelosia crenata subsp. breviscapa
intro: Lomelosia crenata subsp. breviscapa, also known as the short-spurred lomelosia, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, Lomelosia crenata subsp. breviscapa is often used as a tea or tincture, although its availability and traditional uses may vary depending on the region.
